description: Make hex a first-class citizen inside opencode: skills as slash commands, agents as agent personas, and inference routed through hex-nexus

specs.description: Hex skills are injected as opencode slash commands
specs.given: Embedded hex skills exist in hex-cli/assets/skills/ and optionally in .claude/skills/
specs.when: hex chat is invoked and write_opencode_config runs
specs.then: opencode.json contains a command entry for each skill, with key = skill name (without leading /), template = skill body, description = skill description from frontmatter

specs.description: Project-local skills override embedded skills on name collision
specs.given: A skill named hex-adr-create exists in both hex-cli/assets/skills/ and .claude/skills/
specs.then: The .claude/skills/ version takes precedence in the injected command entry

specs.description: Hex agent YAMLs are injected as opencode agent configs
specs.given: 17 agent YAML definitions exist in hex-cli/assets/agents/hex/hex/
specs.then: opencode.json contains an agent entry for each YAML, with model derived from the YAML's model.preferred field and prompt from description + constraints

specs.description: Inference routes through hex-nexus OpenAI-compatible proxy
specs.given: hex-nexus is running and has registered inference providers
specs.when: opencode makes an inference request using the hex provider
specs.then: The request hits hex-nexus POST /v1/chat/completions, which routes to the configured provider (Ollama, OpenRouter, Anthropic, etc.)

specs.description: hex-nexus exposes a model list via GET /v1/models
specs.given: hex-nexus is running with at least one registered inference provider
specs.when: opencode queries GET /v1/models from the hex provider
specs.then: Returns a JSON array of available models in OpenAI format: { id, object: 'model', owned_by: 'hex-nexus' }

specs.description: Graceful degradation when nexus is offline at chat startup
specs.given: hex-nexus is not running when hex chat is invoked
specs.then: opencode.json is written with MCP only (no instructions, no provider injection) — opencode still launches successfully

specs.description: OpenAI proxy forwards only to registered providers — no arbitrary URL forwarding
specs.given: A request arrives at POST /v1/chat/completions with model = 'attacker/model'
specs.then: The request is routed only to providers registered in the nexus inference table; unknown provider prefixes return 400

specs.description: Skills with no description frontmatter are still injected
specs.given: A skill file has a trigger but no description field
specs.then: The command entry is injected with an empty/omitted description — opencode.json remains valid

specs.description: Skill body containing JSON-special characters is safely escaped
specs.given: A skill template contains backslashes, double quotes, or newlines
specs.when: the skill is serialized into opencode.json
specs.then: serde_json serializes the template string correctly — the file parses as valid JSON
